name: Voice AI Receptionist - Call Handler
description: Handles inbound Twilio calls, detects caller intent using OpenAI, generates voice response via ElevenLabs, and logs call data to Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.description: Receives inbound call data from Twilio voice webhook

nodes.name: Extract Caller Input
nodes.description: Parses caller speech input or DTMF from Twilio payload

nodes.name: OpenAI - Intent Detection
nodes.description: Classifies caller intent and generates a response from the FAQ knowledge base

nodes.name: IF - FAQ Match or Escalate
nodes.description: Routes to FAQ response or escalation path based on intent classification

nodes.name: ElevenLabs - Voice Generation
nodes.description: Converts OpenAI text response to natural-sounding audio via ElevenLabs API

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.description: Returns TwiML XML response to Twilio to deliver voice audio to caller

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Call
nodes.description: Logs call timestamp, caller number, intent, response, and outcome

note: Import this file into n8n and configure credentials for Twilio, OpenAI, ElevenLabs, and Google Sheets before activating.
